behavior_summary: U8P_KORICK implements the NPC Korick (a smith/shopkeeper) behavior: short 'U8P_KORICK::look' descriptions, area-entry/exit scheduling and presence management, shop dialogs for armor and weapons, a crafting branch for forging a focus, and reactions to theft/hostility that can summon guards.

Nearby-area handlers (U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea / U8P_KORICK::leaveFastArea) clear transient refs (FREE::resetRef) and delegate to U8P_KORICK::schedule-specific behavior (korickSchedule drives U8P_KORICK::func16D8 vs U8P_KORICK::func1051).

U8P_KORICK::schedule() computes Korick's daily state (korickSchedule) based on time-of-day (FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod), presents/awaits a selection (METHOD::func143A), and applies the chosen U8P_KORICK::schedule (METHOD::func133F).

Conversation/U8P_KORICK::use() builds a dynamic menu, tracks meeting state (korickMet), guards against angry states (korickRealPissed / korickPissed), and routes to internal shop/crafting functions: U8P_KORICK::func0420 (armor), U8P_KORICK::func09BF (weapons), and U8P_KORICK::func6662 (focus crafting).

U8P_KORICK::AvatarStoleSomething(uword) and U8P_KORICK::cast(uword) detect stealing/attacks, bark (e.g., 'Stop! Thief!', 'Help me, Beren!'), reset refs and call CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime to involve guards.
notable_control_flow: Main U8P_KORICK::look process (U8P_KORICK::look) is a short conditional: if dead -> 'dead Korick', else if korickMet -> 'Korick the Smith', else -> 'man'.
Area enter path: U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea always clears runtime refs, then branches on korickSchedule (== 0x02 -> U8P_KORICK::func16D8, == 0x01 -> U8P_KORICK::func1051).

U8P_KORICK::schedule() chooses between two preconfigured state sets based on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod() (<3 vs >=3), calls METHOD::func143A and, if process_result() true, stores the selected index into korickSchedule then calls METHOD::func133F.

Dialog/U8P_KORICK::use() constructs menu options dynamically and uses SuspendAssign + strcmp branches to route choices; selecting buy routes to U8P_KORICK::func0420 or U8P_KORICK::func09BF, the crafting option to U8P_KORICK::func6662.

Movement/approach helpers (U8P_KORICK::func1051, U8P_KORICK::func16D8, U8P_KORICK::func1C3F) attempt Npc::pathfind asynchronously and test process_result() to decide success/failure flows, calling monologue helpers (U8P_KORICK::func119A, U8P_KORICK::func181B, U8P_KORICK::func1D82) on success or spawning fallback timers (FREE::func1C19) on failure.
open_questions: Exact persistent storage/namespace of flags: which flags are global persistent vs script-local (metadata shows korickMet, korickSchedule, korickPissed, korickRealPissed and passedCenteredTest used but canonical global flag listing was empty). Confidence about persistence is inferred, not guaranteed.

Precise semantics and side-effects of METHOD::func143A / METHOD::func133F: they appear to present/resolve U8P_KORICK::schedule selection, but the concrete UI/selection mechanism is external and not fully recovered.

Meaning of numeric/state constants set in U8P_KORICK::schedule() (local0/local1/local2): they are large hex values likely encoding movement/state but the mapping to world routes or animations is not explicit.

Some Unknown nodes and raw usecode remnants (spawn/temps) appear in multiple functions; the exact timing/ordering of spawned FREE::func1C19 tasks (delays/cleanup) is inferred but not precisely reconstructed.

main_function.name: U8P_KORICK::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player inspects Korick, choosing a bark that reflects whether Korick is dead, previously met, or unknown to the player.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player 'looks at' or inspects the NPC (U8P_KORICK::look/inspect action).
Checks Npc::isDead(this) first; if true outputs 'dead Korick'.
Reads korickMet to decide between 'Korick the Smith' (met) and generic 'man' (unmet).

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::look
function_map.role: short inspect/U8P_KORICK::look response selecting dead/met/unmet bark

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::use
function_map.role: conversation entry / menu-driven dialog (greeting, shop entry, crafting option), builds dynamic menus and routes to shop/craft handlers

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: react to theft: filter stolen item types, shout, clear refs, and call guard response

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea
function_map.role: area-entry trigger: clear transient refs then dispatch to U8P_KORICK::schedule-specific behavior

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: area-exit cleanup: clear refs and teleport/hide the NPC if dead

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::schedule
function_map.role: compute and apply NPC daily U8P_KORICK::schedule (korickSchedule) using time-of-day and external method-driven selection

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::cast
function_map.role: react to being targeted/attacked: randomized barks and guard-alert invocation

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func0420
function_map.role: armor shop menu and purchase flow (present options, set price/item locals, attempt equip, check payment, handle insufficient funds or hold-for-later)

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func09BF
function_map.role: weapons shop menu and purchase flow (analogous to U8P_KORICK::func0420 for weapons)

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func6662
function_map.role: crafting dialog for forging a focus: ask yes/no about silver ore, check inventory, present focus options and record selection

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func1051
function_map.role: movement/approach helper used by U8P_KORICK::schedule/U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea: inspect a target, attempt pathfind, call follow-up monologues on success/failure

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func16D8
function_map.role: alternate movement/approach helper (U8P_KORICK::schedule variant) that iterates candidate frames and pathfinds to them, calling different monologues on success

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func119A
function_map.role: short monologue generator: distance-aware randomized barks and associated animation/timing calls

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func181B
function_map.role: ambient stroll/out-of-shop monologue generator with distance/randomization

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func1C3F
function_map.role: approach/interaction retry routine: inspect frame, pathfind, spawn fallbacks and call arrival monologues (U8P_KORICK::func1D82)

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::func1D82
function_map.role: bedroom/indoor monologue set with randomized lines and animation calls

internal_calls.purpose: Enter armor shop flow when player chooses 'Armor' in dialog
Enter weapons shop flow when player chooses 'Weapons' in dialog
Enter focus-crafting flow when player picks 'Make me a focus.'
Invoke a monologue/animation helper after successful pathfinding
Call walk/ambient monologue when pathfind succeeds and nobody is talking

external_calls.purpose: Determine stolen item's type to decide whether to raise an alarm
Notify/dispatch guards when a qualifying item is stolen
Clear transient runtime references on area entry
Teleport (hide/respawn) the NPC when leaving area while dead
Read coarse time-of-day to choose U8P_KORICK::schedule/state values
Present/compute U8P_KORICK::schedule selection (suspend and test process_result())
Finalize/apply selected U8P_KORICK::schedule state after process_result()
Attempt to give/equip purchased armor to the player
Check for payment (nearby coins) after a purchase attempt
Attempt to give/equip purchased weapon to the player
Check for payment (nearby coins) after weapon purchase attempt
Alert guards when Korick is targeted/attacked
Request asynchronous pathfinding to a target; flow uses process_result() to drive success/failure behavior
Iterate pathfind attempts over candidate frames/targets
Spawned helper/timer used as a delayed fallback or effect after pathfind success/failure and around some barks

reads.name: korickMet
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_KORICK::look and U8P_KORICK::use to choose greeting/description variants (met vs generic)

reads.name: korickRealPissed
reads.likely_effect: If set, dialog refuses to speak normally (immediate angry refusal in U8P_KORICK::use())

reads.name: korickPissed
reads.likely_effect: Restricts menu options and influences initial dialog lines in U8P_KORICK::use()

reads.name: passedCenteredTest
reads.likely_effect: Adds the 'Make me a focus.' crafting option to the dialog menu when true

reads.name: korickSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea and U8P_KORICK::use() to decide whether Korick is in-shop vs out-of-shop; influences which behavior helper runs

reads.name: guardsCalled
reads.likely_effect: Checked to avoid repeated guard calls when theft is reported (presence read-only in this script excerpt)

writes.name: korickMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to mark that the player has greeted/met Korick (written in U8P_KORICK::use() when player selects a greeting) — affects future U8P_KORICK::look()/U8P_KORICK::use() behavior

writes.name: korickSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Updated by U8P_KORICK::schedule() after a successful selection (process_result()) to control daily/area behavior

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_KORICK implements the NPC Korick (a smith/shopkeeper) behavior: short 'U8P_KORICK::look' descriptions, area-entry/exit scheduling and presence management, shop dialogs for armor and weapons, a crafting branch for forging a focus, and reactions to theft/hostility that can summon guards.
